tasks.title: Write the pnpm-workspace.yaml and root tsconfig.json
tasks.prompt: From memory, write the pnpm-workspace.yaml file and the root tsconfig.json for Meridian. The workspace has three packages: client, server, db. The tsconfig must include all three non-negotiable TypeScript options.

tasks.title: Identify and Fix Docker Compose Hostname Bug
tasks.prompt: A colleague shares this .env for the server container: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://meridian:pass@localhost:5432/meridian. They say the server container cannot connect to PostgreSQL. Diagnose the problem and write the corrected DATABASE_URL.
success_criteria: Explains that containers on the same Docker network resolve by service name
